name: ibkr
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the ibkr Claude Code plugin (read-only Interactive Brokers integration).

plugins.name: ibkr
plugins.description: Read-only Interactive Brokers integration: account, positions, snapshot + streaming stock/ETF quotes, official market calendars, option chains, daily history, market scans, fixed-fractional position sizing, S&P 500 breadth, combined SPY+SPX dealer gamma, and an eight-row risk-regime dashboard. Requires the `ibkr` binary on PATH; see the project README for install and update instructions.
